tokens: Okay; it looks like, from this position, I'd say that's probably Spur down there, the large one, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Try to get a lock on that beauty (meaning Spur Crater)...
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: There's a real fresh one just down-Sun from here.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: ...and maybe some other landmarks around it so we can drive down to it.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: We'll get to Spur for you, no problem.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Got to be careful you don't fall down getting out.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: 287 (heading), 347 (bearing to the LM), 06.9 (distance driven), 05.0 (range to the LM), 097 (Pause)
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: ...100, 80, 90 (battery numbers), and motor temps are lower limit.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Garbled) you ought to take that tool off of there.
It's just hanging you up every time you turn around.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I haven't had it on at all this morning, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: You haven't hung up on it?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: No, the tool on the side of the Rover.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Man, is this a steep slope.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) Joe, for lack of good antenna pointing, I'm going to bypass the TV this time.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And, Dave, we're assuming that you can't get around to the right position...
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: ...beside the Rover to point that antenna adequately.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: And the slope is real steep.
And, like I'd mentioned before, the sighting device doesn't transmit enough light to really make it very easy to find the Earth.
I think it would take me a couple of minutes, there, just to find you, and I think you've seen the same thing.
But if you would like, I'll give it a try.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Just proceed carefully on the soft powder.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Yeah, we're going to do that because it really is.
(Pause) But you can't say that we didn't sample the Apennine Front.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Jim, did you turn the DAC off yet?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: It's off, and I'm reading a half a Mag.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (To Jim) Okay; let's attack that boulder.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (If you) put it back on (at Station 6), I do.
Gonna be a bear (that is, it will be difficult) to get back up here, you know.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Hey, troops, I'm not sure you should go downslope very far, if at all, from the Rover.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Responding to Joe) No, it's not far.
Let me try it, Jim, you just stay there.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I think we can sidestep back up.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Well, but make sure you check it now; just proceed carefully.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay; I'm halfway, and I'll go back first.
Why don't you stay there, Jim?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) The Rover makes it feel so easy!
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) Should have parked right beside it.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: If you will, I'll walk down, Dave.
Want me to carry some of those tools?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I think I'll...(Responding to Joe) Well, the footing is all right, except that you have to work pretty hard to get back up, so I think what I'm going to do...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Jim, are still up near the Rover?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: ...as Jim walks down...Wait a minute until I get there, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Let me drive the Rover down there.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: ...Ask you to walk around to the front there, and just take a general rough guess as to where the Earth is.
You don't even have to use the sighting device.
Point it about correctly, and we're going to give the TV a try.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I can see where the Earth is in general.
But we're going to make a change here.
If I get successfully down there, then Jim can walk down.
So we don't have to expend all the energy.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And there's a beautiful little rock track here!
It went in a circular arc.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) Instead of going straight down the hill, it curved into the hill.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) A little angular fragment, Joe, about 2 inches long.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And, Dave, are you driving now?
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Meantime, I'll be taking a pan from here, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Looks like it's going to be our high point.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Could you watch me as I back up here?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I have my eye on you.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I'm going to back up gently here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I think I'm going to move downslope a little bit.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I wouldn't know, but I would think you'd be better off with that weight uphill.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Static diminishes) I'm going to finish my pan.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Sounding exceptionally attentive) Roger, Jim and Dave.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Want me to come over there and get on?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And, understand you're proceeding down towards that large block now.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: And I'll even put the old girl downhill (of the rock) here, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Oh, I wish I had the sequence camera to take a picture of the Rover moving along there.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: When you stop, we'd like for you to just take a rough guess with that antenna.
Give us the right switch setting, and we're going to give it a try with our big dish down here.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay; that's as good as we can do.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, Jim, you can come on down now.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Although...See, the back wheel's off the ground.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I think I'll get back on.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Here, you come down and get on.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Well, let me take a picture here anyway.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Oh, you really...Let me hold that Rover and you come up and look at this, because this rock has got green in it, a light green...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay; I'll just stand here until you're through...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: ...and then I'll go up and take a look at it.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: The first green rock I've seen.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Where do you want me to hold it?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Well, just...Come down and stand on your side.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: You stand there and take a break.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave and Jim, use your best judgment here, the block's not all that important, and we'd like you to spend most of the remaining time at Spur Crater.
The remaining Front time, that is.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: And talk to us if we can give you any help here.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: It's just that this slope's pretty steep, and I'd just as soon not spend too much time here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) I don't see any green, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Maybe you have to look down-Sun to see it.
It looks like a light green layer.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Responding to Joe) I took a couple.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yeah, I took two down-Sun at 7 feet.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) (I'll) take a couple of (pictures) cross-Sun here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Be great if we'd get some of that...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I think I can get it with my tongs alright.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: It seems to be a surface material, or else it's a very frangible clast in this big piece of breccia.
(Pause) Sure it's green and not just white albedo again?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And I noticed, just downslope from the rock, you kicked up the surface and there's some more green there.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: This rock is about 3 meters long.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Why don't you describe the thing, Jim, while I'm...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And the surface that's (dramatic reduction in static) facing northwest is the dark, typical breccia.
And it appeared to me like there's a layer there that might be a foot and a half, 2 feet thick, appears a light greenish color.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And on the side to the southeast is again the breccia!
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And I got a little frag.
And I got some green, and I got a frag out of the breccia.
(Long Pause) It's fairly loose breccia, as breccias go.
(Pause) Oh, and there's a great big white clast on the inside, man, like an inch or so.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: If you want I'll (bring up a bag)...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Got a little bit of the green (soil), and I got a chunk about 3 inches of the rock itself.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And I think we'll call it quits on that one.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: We're interested in moving towards Spur...
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: It's going to take us awhile.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Just stand right there and let me ease on down.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: It's going to take us a while to work downslope.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I think it'll probably be best for you to get on first.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (I'll) put this where I won't lose it.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Hand it to me, I'll put it under my seat.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I can put it under mine.
Trouble is, if I get on first, I'm not sure you're going to have a seatbelt.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Well, I don't know that I want to drop it.
We're not going to go that fast here.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Are you going to be able to strap in?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Let me get settled down here first.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Tell you what might be better, Jim.
Let me ease on down the hill here to a flatter spot for you to get on.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: You see right at 1 o'clock there, it levels out in that little depression.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Look, why don't you move back there and let me ease the thing down.
Move away from it, so I won't hit you.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: In fact, I'd just as soon meet you down where it's level.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: If you want, I'll meet you at Spur.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) Just going to go right down here.
(Pause) Easier for you to get on.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: That's a nice spot, right there.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) Why don't you grab your seatbelt and let me hold it for you, and maybe you can give it a try.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: No, I'll just hang on, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And, Jim, if you can easily turn the camera on, might be a good place.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Not now, Joe, let us ease our way down.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I'll take a little right turn here.
Came up all right; we should be able to go down all right.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Going down's a little more tricky.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Oh, we can get a little a couple of Christies here and there.
transcript.speaker: Scott
